title: Terminal Result Record
description: Written once by the bot (or by run.sh as a stub on crash) at match end. Single source of truth for iteration outcome and telemetry-based stall detection.

cause.description: Human-readable description of how the match ended.

victory_signal.description: Required when outcome='win'. Only 'engine-shutdown-gameover' is valid for this feature (Clarifications Q1).

error_message.description: Error details when outcome='error'. Null otherwise.

commands_total.description: Total AICommands the bot sent to the engine during the match.

units_built.description: Count of friendly UnitFinished events during the match.

units_lost.description: Count of friendly UnitDestroyed events during the match.

enemy_units_killed.description: Count of EnemyDestroyed events attributable to friendly units.

peak_metal.description: Highest observed Metal.Current during the match.

peak_energy.description: Highest observed Energy.Current during the match.

frames_survived.description: Frame count at which our commander was still alive. Equals 'frames' unless we died before the frame limit.
